_comment: BCS-DEF-1-TG R2 BLOCKER#3 + R3 WARN#3 closures (2026-05-19). Frozen fixtures derived from Node 22 fetch() failure modes against an unreachable Telegram URL. Token in fixtures is a SYNTHETIC value '1234567890:ABCDEFGHijklmnopQRSTuvwxyz_-XYZ123' — NOT a real BotFather token. Regeneration: bot+token fragments in error strings depend on the platform's TCP stack; if you change Node major version, re-run scripts/regenerate-telegram-fetch-errors.mjs (not committed; lives in plan §3.1b runbook). Tests assert the redactor neutralises (a) full token, (b) bot<digits>:... URL form, (c) last-8 chars.
